gist.headline: Complexity, simplified
gist.blurb: Stop guessing if that nested loop is a bad idea. ExplainMyBigO joins the toolkit to check your math.
gist.summary: Added ExplainMyBigO to the Dev_Tools collection, providing automated Big-O time and space complexity analysis for code snippets.
gist.impact: Developers can now instantly visualize the theoretical performance of their algorithms without leaving the ecosystem.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy classroom or study setting. The Robot mascot is acting as a professor, pointing to a chalkboard with a complexity graph (exponential curve). Polly the Bee is a student with glasses and a notebook. Represents learning and analysis.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the robot mascot standing next to a chalkboard with a lime green (#ecf874) complexity graph curve drawn on it. The bee mascot wears tiny glasses and holds a notebook. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Pixel text on board: 'O(n)'. Nostalgic and educational.
